历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the science group was approximately 4446 → 5886 → 8260 → 9452 → 10758, with a continuous backward shift for 5 consecutive years, accumulating a shift of about 6312 places; in the last 3 years, the annual shift was about 1300–1500 places, with a baseline of about 10758 in 2025, showing a clear backward trend; the provincial science group enrollment plan was 29 in 2021, 31 in 2022, 31 in 2023, 32 in 2024, and 35 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 36, an increase of 1 compared to 2025, a slight expansion, which slightly eases competition but has limited impact.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 57th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, with a slight decline from 47th to 57th in recent years, still among the top finance and economics institutions nationwide; no significant negative public opinion incidents have been detected in recent reputation monitoring; ranked 91st in Douyin comprehensive popularity, rated as 'average', with moderate attention on short video platforms, showing no signs of overheating in applications. Applied Economics A, Business Administration A, Foreign Language and Literature A-, with outstanding disciplinary strength among finance and economics institutions; majors such as Finance, Economics, and Business Administration are highly aligned with advantageous disciplines, still strongly attractive to high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of finance/finance and economics/economics majors in 2024 was assessed as 'differentiated and wait-and-see', with a slight warming compared to 2023; the total number of Gaokao candidates in the province in 2026 is about 451,000, with an estimated physics category of about 313,000 based on recent proportions, a slight decrease from 321,000 in 2025, slightly reducing competition pressure; the university is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal to Anhui candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong trend of significant backward shifts in the science group rankings for 5 consecutive years, the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan by 1 person, the slight decrease in the number of physics category candidates in the province, and the stable reputation of the school, it is expected that the minimum ranking for the science group in 2026 will continue to shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 10758; the predicted minimum ranking is about 10962, with a range of 10462–11462.
